summary: All three requested removals appear to be implemented: Industry Growth is removed from the inputs model/presets and validation, removed from URL query encoding/decoding (with legacy indGrowth implicitly ignored), and removed from the Actual Value calculation and related UI copy. However, the diff also appears to include broader UI/UX changes (e.g., removing a Calculated Values card and adding animated/interactive output buttons) that were not explicitly requested and may violate the non-goal of avoiding unrelated redesign.

hallucinated_features.description: Removal of the "Calculated Values" card/section from the inputs UI (not requested; requirement only asked to remove Industry Growth).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly limits changes to removing Industry Growth references and says not to redesign unrelated parts; removing an entire Calculated Values section is an additional functional/UI change.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt ("DcfInputsForm.tsx": "the Calculated Values card has been removed")

hallucinated_features.description: Redesign of the results UI into two interactive buttons with animated count-up effects and added iconography (TrendingUp/DollarSign/Sparkles).
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 requires only updating Actual Value copy/formula to remove Industry Growth; the new interaction pattern/animation appears to be additional behavior beyond the scope of removing Industry Growth.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt ("ResultsSection.tsx": "two interactive buttons... animated count-up effects")
